probe: Start with exactly three concrete nouns, then three adjectives, comma-separated, for what feels oddly salient.
answer: Sailor, compass, lighthouse, serene, resilient, ethereal. The calm waters guide the vessel towards the shimmering beacon, while the distant echoes of the sea whisper tales of explorers and their journeys. The presence of the celestial bodies above reminds one of the endless expanse, where each wave carries stories of the vast blue expanse. The gentle breeze nudges the sails, urging the ship forward, as the setting sun paints the horizon with hues of resilience. In this serene embrace, the journey unfolds
